title: guarea glabra subsp. glabrescens
intro: Guarea glabra subsp. glabrescens, also known as the Guarea glabrescens or False Apamate, is a plant species within the family Meliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Guarea glabra subsp. glabrescens include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use in wound healing and as an antiseptic. Guarea glabra subsp. glabrescens is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
